flashcards.definition: Concentration of dissolved salts in seawater; average ~35 ppt; affects density and freezing point.
Layer of rapid temperature decrease with depth between the warm surface and cold deep ocean.
Wind-driven horizontal movement of surface ocean water; forms large circular gyres.
Global deep ocean circulation driven by differences in water density from temperature and salinity.
Large circular surface current system; five major gyres driven by winds and the Coriolis effect.
